acceptedAnswer.text: Track LA AEO via Google Search Console impressions, snippet clicks, voice search analytics tools like AnswerThePublic.[1][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Monitor PAA expansions, AI overview appearances. LA tools: SEMrush Position Tracking. Benchmarks: 10% query coverage goal. Adjust based on data—stagnation signals content gaps.[4]
